title: CREATE TABLE WITH DATA...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders AS SELECT id, name FROM users WHERE id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id DESC;
CREATE TABLE products (product_id INTEGER, price REAL, stock INTEGER CHECK (stock >= 0));
key_bug_features: CREATE TABLE AS SELECT with data clause
